visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
Important note: Travel insurance submitted by the applicant applying for Denmark visa should also specifically include
Click here to download Please ensure to use the attached invitation letter for this visit.
Harmonized Checklist Denmark 
Documents Required for Red carpet programme 
Click here to see pre-approved travel medical insurances 
Please Note: 
Download Adobe Acrobat Reader (http://www.adobe.com/products/acrobat/readstep2.html)
To download the Application Form:
ONLINE VISA APPLICATION (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Business]
Please  click here to check visa fee (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/1210)
Note: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
Please Note:

- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Premium Services tab.
- Please note Applicants applying outside Riyadh need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 5, it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Riyadh back to regional VFS Visa Application Centers across Saudi Arabia.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in Saudi riyal.
visa_types.processing_time:
Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy) – normally 15 calendar days, see the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa) for a fully completed application with proper documentation which is handed in at the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please hand in your application well in advance
                                                                        during peak season.
Cases for Danish Immigration Service (DIS) – See the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service)                            and add 3-5 working days of processing time at the Embassy.
The processing period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases, notably if further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Schengen
                                                                        State are consulted.
Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
Citizens of certain countries or categories of certain citizens are subject to prior consultation in one or more Schengen countries before a visa may be issued. The processing time in these cases will usually be 10-12 days as a
                                                                        minimum. See list of these nationalities and categories of persons  (annex 16 to the Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
Kindly note that if you are applying from VFS in Jeddah/Al Khobar, it will take additional 48 hours due to logistics
visa_types.forms:
Register your visa application online and book an appointment with VFS
"NEW MANDATORY ONLINE VISA APPLICATION: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online. After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print
                            the cover letter and payment receipt from ApplyVisa (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) ‘’ .
Click here (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) to fill in your visa application form 
After completing the visa application form and paying visa fee online, you must book an appointment to submit your documents at VFS by clicking here. (https://online.vfsglobal.com/GlobalAppointment/Account/RegisteredLogin?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/K5maLhVGazsqnFoY4fpVGKANxS5YqG65bzywuVf991PxZzrFfwUJgLhTpiwknYyZr3V/fe7d7I/AQfvjnvxA6E=) Make sure to bring along all the required  documents and hand in supporting documents at the Visa  Application Centre.
Make sure you are on time for your appointment; for those showing up late there is no guarantee that the application can be submitted and applicants may need to reschedule their appointment. Kindly, notify the Denmark visa application
                            centre if you are unable to make your appointment.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category is applicable in case you are travelling for business. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category is applicable in case you are travelling for business. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Business]
Please  click here to check visa fee (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/1210)
Note: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
Please Note:

- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Premium Services tab.
- Please note Applicants applying outside Riyadh need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 5, it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Riyadh back to regional VFS Visa Application Centers across Saudi Arabia.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in Saudi riyal.

## Documents Required
Important note: Travel insurance submitted by the applicant applying for Denmark visa should also specifically include
Click here to download Please ensure to use the attached invitation letter for this visit.
Harmonized Checklist Denmark 
Documents Required for Red carpet programme 
Click here to see pre-approved travel medical insurances 
Please Note: 
Download Adobe Acrobat Reader (http://www.adobe.com/products/acrobat/readstep2.html)
To download the Application Form:
ONLINE VISA APPLICATION (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)

## Photo Specifications
Size of photograph for visa applications
After the instalment of a new system for scanning biometrics, including photographs for visa application, it is now possible to lodge a photograph of size 35 x 45 mm. Length of the head should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from
                                                                        chin to top of hair.
The photograph must still be in color with white background.
Danish Visa Application Centre has been instructed by Danish mission to inform applicants that the visa application is not acceptable if the photograph does not comply with the above format.
Applicants may therefore obtain a new photograph that meets all requirements before The Danish Visa Application Centre can receive the application.
For further information see the print on the information board at The Danish Visa Application Centre or visit website https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto (https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto)

## Processing Time
Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy) – normally 15 calendar days, see the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa) for a fully completed application with proper documentation which is handed in at the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please hand in your application well in advance
                                                                        during peak season.
Cases for Danish Immigration Service (DIS) – See the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service)                            and add 3-5 working days of processing time at the Embassy.
The processing period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases, notably if further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Schengen
                                                                        State are consulted.
Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
Citizens of certain countries or categories of certain citizens are subject to prior consultation in one or more Schengen countries before a visa may be issued. The processing time in these cases will usually be 10-12 days as a
                                                                        minimum. See list of these nationalities and categories of persons  (annex 16 to the Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
Kindly note that if you are applying from VFS in Jeddah/Al Khobar, it will take additional 48 hours due to logistics 

## Download Forms
Register your visa application online and book an appointment with VFS
"NEW MANDATORY ONLINE VISA APPLICATION: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online. After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print
                            the cover letter and payment receipt from ApplyVisa (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) ‘’ .
Click here (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) to fill in your visa application form 
After completing the visa application form and paying visa fee online, you must book an appointment to submit your documents at VFS by clicking here. (https://online.vfsglobal.com/GlobalAppointment/Account/RegisteredLogin?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/K5maLhVGazsqnFoY4fpVGKANxS5YqG65bzywuVf991PxZzrFfwUJgLhTpiwknYyZr3V/fe7d7I/AQfvjnvxA6E=) Make sure to bring along all the required  documents and hand in supporting documents at the Visa  Application Centre.
Make sure you are on time for your appointment; for those showing up late there is no guarantee that the application can be submitted and applicants may need to reschedule their appointment. Kindly, notify the Denmark visa application
                            centre if you are unable to make your appointment.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This Visa applies when a citizen with permanent residence in Denmark loses his/her residence card.
Kindly refer to the required documents for checklist.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This Visa applies when a citizen with permanent residence in Denmark loses his/her residence card.
Kindly refer to the required documents for checklist.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Friends Or Family]
Please  click here to check visa fee (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/1210)
Note: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)

Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling for visit relatives and friends. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry and that the holders of visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided for in Article 5 of the Visa
                                                                        Code. 
Information Letter

Kindly note that if you are applying from VFS in Jeddah/Al Khobar, it will take additional 48 hours due to logistics 

## Download Forms
Register your visa application online and book an appointment with VFS
"NEW MANDATORY ONLINE VISA APPLICATION: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online. After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print
                                                                        the cover letter and payment receipt from ApplyVisa (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) ‘’ .
Click here (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) to fill in your visa application form 
After completing the visa application form and paying visa fee online, you must book an appointment to submit your documents at VFS by clicking here. (https://online.vfsglobal.com/GlobalAppointment/Account/RegisteredLogin?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/K5maLhVGazsqnFoY4fpVGKANxS5YqG65bzywuVf991PxZzrFfwUJgLhTpiwknYyZr3V/fe7d7I/AQfvjnvxA6E=) Make sure to bring along all the required  documents and hand in supporting documents at the
                                                                        Visa Application Centre.
Make sure you are on time for your appointment; for those showing up late there is no guarantee that the application can be submitted and applicants may need to reschedule their appointment. Kindly, notify the Denmark visa application
                                                                        centre if you are unable to make your appointment.

visa_types.name: Short Term Stay
visa_types.overview:
"NEW  ONLINE  VISA APPLICATION (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage): From the 01 July 2019, you should fill in your visa  application and pay the application fee online using https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage). After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print  and sign the cover letter from ApplyVisa (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) and hand in supporting documents and supply biometrics at the Visa  Application Centre” 
(For a maximum stay of 90 days per 6 months)
If you wish to visit Denmark for a short period of time, you  must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa  requirement for entering these countries. 
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in  Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period  of six months (180 days) from the entry date into the Schengen Area.
visa_types.full_text:
"NEW  ONLINE  VISA APPLICATION (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage): From the 01 July 2019, you should fill in your visa  application and pay the application fee online using https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage). After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print  and sign the cover letter from ApplyVisa (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) and hand in supporting documents and supply biometrics at the Visa  Application Centre” 
(For a maximum stay of 90 days per 6 months)
If you wish to visit Denmark for a short period of time, you  must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa  requirement for entering these countries. 
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in  Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period  of six months (180 days) from the entry date into the Schengen Area.

Note: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
Please Note:

- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Premium Services tab.
- Please note Applicants applying outside Riyadh need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 5, it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Riyadh back to regional VFS Visa Application Centers across Saudi Arabia.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in Saudi riyal.
visa_types.processing_time:
Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy) – normally 15 calendar days,see the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa) for a fully completed application with proper documentation which is handed in at the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please hand in your application well in advance
                                                                        during peak season.
Cases for Danish Immigration Service (DIS) – See the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service)                            and add 3-5 working days of processing time at the Embassy.
The processing period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases, notably if further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Schengen
                                                                        State are consulted.
Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
Citizens of certain countries or categories of certain citizens are subject to prior consultation in one or more Schengen countries before a visa may be issued. The processing time in these cases will usually be 10-12 days as a
                                                                        minimum. See list of these nationalities and categories of persons  (annex 16 to the Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
Kindly note that if you are applying from VFS in Jeddah/Al Khobar, it will take additional 48 hours due to logistics

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel, including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If the applicant during any portion of their visit intends to engage in business and/or official
                                                                        duties, he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel, including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If the applicant during any portion of their visit intends to engage in business and/or official
                                                                        duties, he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Tourist]
Please  click here to check visa fee (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/1210)
Note: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
Please Note:

- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Premium Services tab.
- Please note Applicants applying outside Riyadh need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 5, it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Riyadh back to regional VFS Visa Application Centers across Saudi Arabia.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in Saudi riyal.

## Documents Required
important note: Travel insurance submitted by the applicant applying for Denmark visa should also specifically include
Click here to download
Harmonized Checklist Denmark
Click here to see pre-approved travel medical insurances
Sponsorship Letter
Travel Plan
Please Note: 
To download the Application Form:
ONLINE VISA APPLICATION (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)

## Photo Specifications
Size of photograph for visa applications
After the instalment of a new system for scanning biometrics, including photographs for visa application, it is now possible to lodge a photograph of size 35 x 45 mm. Length of the head should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from
                                                                        chin to top of hair.
The photograph must still be in color with white background.
Danish Visa Application Centre has been instructed by Danish mission to inform applicants that the visa application is not acceptable if the photograph does not comply with the above format.
Applicants may therefore obtain a new photograph that meets all requirements before The Danish Visa Application Centre can receive the application.
For further information see the print on the information board at The Danish Visa Application Centre or visit website https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto (https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto)

## Processing Time
Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy) – normally 15 calendar days,see the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa) for a fully completed application with proper documentation which is handed in at the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please hand in your application well in advance
                                                                        during peak season.
Cases for Danish Immigration Service (DIS) – See the processing time in https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service)                            and add 3-5 working days of processing time at the Embassy.
The processing period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases, notably if further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Schengen
                                                                        State are consulted.
Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
Citizens of certain countries or categories of certain citizens are subject to prior consultation in one or more Schengen countries before a visa may be issued. The processing time in these cases will usually be 10-12 days as a
                                                                        minimum. See list of these nationalities and categories of persons  (annex 16 to the Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
Kindly note that if you are applying from VFS in Jeddah/Al Khobar, it will take additional 48 hours due to logistics 

## Download Forms
Register your visa application online and book an appointment with VFS
"NEW MANDATORY ONLINE VISA APPLICATION: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online. After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print
                                                                        the cover letter and payment receipt from ApplyVisa (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) ‘’ .
Click here (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage) to fill in your visa application form 
After completing the visa application form and paying visa fee online, you must book an appointment to submit your documents at VFS by clicking here (https://online.vfsglobal.com/GlobalAppointment/Account/RegisteredLogin?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/K5maLhVGazsqnFoY4fpVGKANxS5YqG65bzywuVf991PxZzrFfwUJgLhTpiwknYyZr3V/fe7d7I/AQfvjnvxA6E=). Make sure to bring along all the required  documents and hand in supporting documents at the Visa  Application Centre.
Make sure you are on time for your appointment; for those showing up late there is no guarantee that the application can be submitted and applicants may need to reschedule their appointment. Kindly, notify the Denmark visa application
                                                                        centre if you are unable to make your appointment.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category is applicable in case you are required to have a visa for an airport transit stop. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter
